title: Shield of Axolotl Bucket
description: 将盾牌做成美西螈桶的样式 Make the shield look like a Bucket of Axolotl
body:
这是一个模型资源包，将盾牌做成了类似**美西螈桶**的样式.

This is a model resource pack that makes the shield look like **bucket of axolotl**.
<details>
<summary>第三人称持盾Click here</summary>

 ![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BJLk4Svq/images/e82389e6216fc1dcd14640b0258f0d9509ee97a0.png)

</details>


一共使用了四种纹理——美西螈桶，美西螈uv，水桶 和 圆石.
**（1.4最新版本已经合并成单独一个）**

A total of four textures were used ——Axolotl Bucket、Axolotl UV、Water Bucket and cobblestone。
**(The v1.4 includes the later versions has been merged into a single one)**
 
可用于美西螈出现后的版本，并且与OptiFine兼容.

Suitable for versions after the appearance of salamanders and compatible with Optifine.

（虽然更改了文件位置，但是美西螈uv仍有可能被其他资源包干扰，发生错误）. 

*(Although the file location has been changed, the axolotl UV may still be interfered with by other resource packages, and an error has occurred) .

---

在1.3版本中，为Faithful32x专门适配了贴图.

In v1.3, pack were adapted specifically for Faithful32x.

<details>
<summary>Faithful32x支持 Click here</summary>

 ![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BJLk4Svq/images/b8948a30a21462a73411beb4b4e1bc41283c5c02.png)

</details>
